faq.question: Rajasthan RPSC SI, Platoon Commander Online Form Start Date?
faq.answer: The online application process started on 10 August 2025.

faq.question: Rajasthan RPSC SI, Platoon Commander Exam Date?
faq.answer: The Examination will be conducted in 05-06 April 2026.

faq.question: Where can I find the syllabus for the Rajasthan RPSC SI, Platoon Commander Examination?
faq.answer: The detailed syllabus and examination scheme for the Rajasthan RPSC SI, Platoon Commander Examination are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete syllabus details.

faq.question: Rajasthan RPSC SI, Platoon Commander Recruitment Last Date?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online is 08 September 2025.

faq.question: What is the last date to Update application fee Details?
faq.answer: Candidates can pay the application fee up to 09 September 2025.

faq.question: 10 August 2025 to 08 September 2025
faq.answer: Rajasthan RPSC SI, Platoon Commander Interview Letter 2026

textSections.section: How to Fill : UPSSSC UP Technical Assistant Group C Recruitment Online Form 2026
textSections.content: There are 02 types to apply online for UPSSSC UP Technical Assistant Group C (AGTA) Recruitment Advt No. 06-Exam/2026 Recruitment 2026. | First: In this, the candidate will have to login with his personal information, the information that has to be given is: PET Registration Number, Date of Birth, Gender, Domicile and Category. | Second : In this, the candidate will have to login through his OTP, the information that has to be given is: UPSSSC PET 2025 Registration Number and OTP Password. | After login, the complete information of the candidate, his photo and signature will also be visible, the candidate will have to fill the information related to the post he is asking for and the application fee: Rs.25/- will have to be paid. | Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. | Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. | Before Apply Online / Submit Application Form Must Check the Preview an

howToApply: There are 02 types to apply online for UPSSSC UP Technical Assistant Group C (AGTA) Recruitment Advt No. 06-Exam/2026 Recruitment 2026
First: In this, the candidate will have to login with his personal information, the information that has to be given is: PET Registration Number, Date of Birth, Gender, Domicile and Category
Second : In this, the candidate will have to login through his OTP, the information that has to be given is: UPSSSC PET 2025 Registration Number and OTP Password

After login, the complete information of the candidate, his photo and signature will also be visible, the candidate will have to fill the information related to the post he is asking for and the application fee: Rs.25/- will have to be paid
Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details
Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc
Before Apply Online / Submit Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully
Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form

textSections.section: How to Fill : UPSSSC UP Assistant Statistical Officer Recruitment Online Form 2026
textSections.content: There are 02 types to apply online for UPSSSC UP Assistant Statistical Officer Recruitment Advt No. 05-Exam/2026 Recruitment 2026. | First: In this, the candidate will have to login with his personal information, the information that has to be given is: PET Registration Number, Date of Birth, Gender, Domicile and Category. | Second : In this, the candidate will have to login through his OTP, the information that has to be given is: UPSSSC PET 2025 Registration Number and OTP Password. | After login, the complete information of the candidate, his photo and signature will also be visible, the candidate will have to fill the information related to the post he is asking for and the application fee: Rs.25/- will have to be paid. | Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. | Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. | Before Apply Online / Submit Application Form Must Check the Preview and All

howToApply: There are 02 types to apply online for UPSSSC UP Assistant Statistical Officer Recruitment Advt No. 05-Exam/2026 Recruitment 2026
First: In this, the candidate will have to login with his personal information, the information that has to be given is: PET Registration Number, Date of Birth, Gender, Domicile and Category
Second : In this, the candidate will have to login through his OTP, the information that has to be given is: UPSSSC PET 2025 Registration Number and OTP Password

After login, the complete information of the candidate, his photo and signature will also be visible, the candidate will have to fill the information related to the post he is asking for and the application fee: Rs.25/- will have to be paid
Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details

textSections.section: How to Fill UPSC CMSE 2025 Online Form
textSections.content: Photo Instruction : Ensure that the name of candidate and the date on which the photograph was taken are clearly mentioned on the photograph. | To apply for Combined Medical Services Examination CMS 2025 in Union Public Service Commission (UPSC), it will be necessary to do One Time Registration. Applications will not be accepted without OTR. | The application window of UPSC Combined Medical Services Examination CMS 2025 can be applied online from 19 February 2025 to 11 March 2025. | The number of examination centers / cities remains limited in UPSC Combined Medical Services Examination CMS 2025 recruitment, so if the candidate wants the examination city of his choice, then applies as soon as possible. After applying, the exam city which will be seen in red color means that that city is now full. | After completing the application in UPSC Combined Medical Services Examination CMS 2024 Recruitment, take the final print out. | for More Details Must Read the Notification.

howToApply: Photo Instruction : Ensure that the name of candidate and the date on which the photograph was taken are clearly mentioned on the photograph
To apply for Combined Medical Services Examination CMS 2025 in Union Public Service Commission (UPSC), it will be necessary to do One Time Registration. Applications will not be accepted without OTR
The application window of UPSC Combined Medical Services Examination CMS 2025 can be applied online from 19 February 2025 to 11 March 2025

The number of examination centers / cities remains limited in UPSC Combined Medical Services Examination CMS 2025 recruitment, so if the candidate wants the examination city of his choice, then applies as soon as possible. After applying, the exam city which will be seen in red color means that that city is now full
After completing the application in UPSC Combined Medical Services Examination CMS 2024 Recruitment, take the final print out
for More Details Must Read the Notification
additionalData.photo_instruction: Ensure that the name of candidate and the date on which the photograph was taken are clearly mentioned on the photograph.

faq.answer: Medical Officers Grade in General Duty Medical officers Sub Cadre of Central Health Service
